name: sumsec-skills
description: SummerSec personal Agent Skills marketplace package. Includes skill-optimizer, git-commit-pr, find-skills, humanizer-zh (CLI + guidance), remotion-best-practices, creating-blog-web-ppt (HTML slides from Markdown), and can expand with more reusable skills over time.

plugins.name: sumsec
plugins.description: SumSec-Skills plugin package for reusable personal skills, including skill-optimizer, git-commit-pr, find-skills, humanizer-zh, remotion-best-practices, and creating-blog-web-ppt.
